message:
fix: register workload_status card type in cardRegistry (#9825)

The workload_status card type existed in widgetRegistry.ts but was
missing from cardRegistry.ts, causing 'Unknown card type: workload_status'
on the Frameworks dashboard. Register it as an alias for WorkloadMonitor
in all four registry maps (CARD_COMPONENTS, CARD_CHUNK_PRELOADERS,
LIVE_DATA_CARDS, CARD_DEFAULT_WIDTHS).

Fixes #9816

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
